sys_script.description: 2.5 P3 STRY0080141 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) My Documents Tab and Shared DocumentsTab on the Task Form. STRY0080143 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Top Task Owner OR Assigned Member selects a UI to Enable OR Disable Shared Documents on the entire task tree. STRY0080193 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Documents - Disable Sharing UI - Warning Confirmation message Tasker Scrum Team. STRY0080195 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploading documents to the My Documents tab. STRY0080196 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploads DocInt documents to the Shared Documents tab.
sys_script.name: Tasker - onDisplay - set SharedFolder
